name: Set of 3 Bud Vases Indigo - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Beautifully accent any table or shelf with the Set of 3 Bud Vases from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This set of three vases is designed in varying shapes to give you versatile display options. Made of ceramic, this watertight vase set make it easy to display your favorite fresh or faux floral arrangements.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
